name: Ubiquiti 150W AC/DC Hot-Swappable Power Module
title: Ubiquiti 150W AC/DC Hot-Swappable Power Module
short_description: Compatible with EFG and UXG-Enterprise models, this power module delivers consistent 12V DC output at 12.5A, supporting a total output power of 150W.
description: The Ubiquiti Hot-Swappable Power Module (UACC-PSU-12V-150W) is designed to provide reliable power to Ubiquiti devices, ensuring optimal performance in demanding environments. Compatible with EFG and UXG-Enterprise models, this power module delivers consistent 12V DC output at 12.5A, supporting a total output power of 150W. Engineered to handle a wide range of input voltages from 100V to 240V AC, it is adaptable to various power sources, making it a versatile solution for both commercial and enterprise settings. The UACC-PSU-12V-150W power module offers impressive efficiency, operating at full load with an efficiency rating of over 81%. This efficiency helps reduce energy consumption and heat generation, contributing to more reliable operation of your devices.

detailed_description.heading: Reliable Power Solution
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Hot-Swappable Power Module (UACC-PSU-12V-150W) is designed to provide reliable power to Ubiquiti devices, ensuring optimal performance in demanding environments. Compatible with EFG and UXG-Enterprise models, this power module delivers consistent 12V DC output at 12.5A, supporting a total output power of 150W. Engineered to handle a wide range of input voltages from 100V to 240V AC, it is adaptable to various power sources, making it a versatile solution for both commercial and enterprise settings. The UACC-PSU-12V-150W power module offers impressive efficiency, operating at full load with an efficiency rating of over 81%. This efficiency helps reduce energy consumption and heat generation, contributing to more reliable operation of your devices.

detailed_description.heading: Robust Protection Features
detailed_description.text: This power module is equipped with advanced protection features to ensure the longevity and safety of your equipment. The overvoltage protection feature kicks in at 13.5V, preventing damage to connected devices due to unexpected power surges. Additionally, the overcurrent protection is set between 18.5A and 22.5A, safeguarding the power module and connected devices from excessive current that could potentially lead to overheating or component failure. These protection mechanisms ensure that your Ubiquiti devices operate smoothly without interruption. The power module is designed to handle inrush currents of less than 50A peak, ensuring a stable and reliable power supply even during initial startup. This capability makes it an excellent choice for environments where consistent power delivery is crucial.

detailed_description.heading: Easy Installation and Maintenance
detailed_description.text: The Ubiquiti Hot-Swappable Power Module is designed with user convenience in mind. Its hot-swappable feature allows for easy installation and replacement without the need to power down the system, minimizing downtime and ensuring continuous operation. With an input frequency range of 50/60Hz and a maximum input current of 7A at 120V AC or 3.6A at 230V AC, this power module is suitable for a wide range of electrical setups, making it an essential component for maintaining the reliability and efficiency of your Ubiquiti network infrastructure.
